clarvia-mcp-server.description: Run the Clarvia AEO Scanner MCP server — search and analyze 27,000+ MCP tools

examples.title: Find the best database MCP server
examples.prompt: Search for the highest-rated database MCP servers and tell me which has the best AEO score

examples.title: Check my MCP server quality
examples.prompt: Analyze my MCP server at github.com/myorg/my-mcp-server and give me an AEO quality score

examples.title: Compare two MCP servers
examples.prompt: Compare supabase-mcp and postgres-mcp — which has better agent discoverability?
